data.name: GADGET GUY: The Beginning
data.detailed_description:
About The Game

Gadget Guy: The Beginning is a captivating visual novel that takes you on a journey through time. You play as a 20-year-old who has traveled back from the future to rectify his past regrets.

Thank you for your interest in our game. Please note that this game is not yet completed and is still in development.

data.short_description: Gadget Guy: The Beginning is a linear visual novel game. Play as a 20-year-old time traveler from the future, revisiting the past to fix his regrets.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
